title: antrophyum wallichianum
intro: Antrophyum wallichianum, also known as the Himalayan fern, is a type of plant in the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Antrophyum wallichianum include its ability to soothe coughs and relieve congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder for its medicinal use.
